name: Umbral Marshmallows
outcome: [AttackerName] squeezes and rubs her huge marshmallowy tits against [TargetName]'s increasingly charmed face, gradually melting away all resistance with pulses of magic, pheromones, and simple sweet sensation, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] eagerly nuzzling into her intoxicating cleavage.
miss: [AttackerName] squeezes and rubs her huge marshmallowy tits against [TargetName]'s increasingly charmed face, gradually melting away all resistance with pulses of magic, pheromones, and simple sweet sensation, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to briefly break free of the charming haze!
